title: Platform operations Control Plane demo
description: A guided product scenario for the focused three-tab SkeinRank UI: Playground, AI Inbox, and Schema & Snapshots.
demo_query: k8s pg timeout during phoenix rollout

safety.production_changes_flow: proposal -> validation -> risk policy -> review -> snapshot/GitOps rollout

ui_tabs.name: Playground
ui_tabs.purpose: Debug canonicalization and compare binding-backed runtime behavior before rollout.
ui_tabs.primary_demo_action: Run the demo query and inspect canonical values: kubernetes, postgresql, and project phoenix.

ui_tabs.name: AI Inbox
ui_tabs.purpose: Review agent-submitted proposals with evidence, validation status, and risk/apply policy.
ui_tabs.primary_demo_action: Open each pending proposal card and compare low, medium, and high-risk states.

ui_tabs.name: Schema & Snapshots
ui_tabs.purpose: Inspect the profile, binding, terminology tree, aliases, and runtime snapshot status without direct CRUD writes.
ui_tabs.primary_demo_action: Open the platform_ops tree and inspect canonical terms, aliases, and the production binding.

guided_steps.action: Run the demo query in single mode.
guided_steps.expected_result: The query plan shows canonical values for kubernetes, postgresql, and project phoenix.

guided_steps.action: Switch to compare mode and use the same binding in both columns for a safe baseline comparison.
guided_steps.expected_result: Both columns should agree before a new draft snapshot exists; this demonstrates the split-screen workflow.

guided_steps.action: Review the edge, EKS, OpenSearch, and prod proposals.
guided_steps.expected_result: The detail panel shows evidence snapshots, validation findings, and low/medium/high risk policy decisions.

guided_steps.action: Open the platform_ops schema tree and inspect runtime binding plus canonical aliases.
guided_steps.expected_result: The tree shows the production binding, category/slot groups, canonical terms, aliases, and read-only details.

guided_steps.action: Open a legacy page and confirm write tools are locked unless VITE_SKEINRANK_ENABLE_LEGACY_WRITE_TOOLS=true.
guided_steps.expected_result: The UI reinforces that production changes go through proposals, validation, snapshots, and GitOps.

operator_notes: Use make demo-reset for a screenshot-ready local state.
Use make demo-status for read-only state inspection.
Do not enable legacy write tools for product demos unless you are explicitly showing local development bypass behavior.
